title: Show latest chat message timestamp for unnamed sessions

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Behavior spec:

Feature: Unnamed chat session labels
Scenario: An unnamed chat session has a recent message
Given a chat session has no explicit name
And the session has a most-recent message timestamp
When the session appears in the console chat session list or ProcedureTask detail chat UI
Then the UI shows the standard Timestamp component for that most-recent message instead of a generated Session <id> fallback

Scenario: A named chat session is shown
Given a chat session has an explicit name
When the session appears in either UI
Then the name remains the session label.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented unnamed chat session labels with the standard Timestamp component sourced from the session's most recent loaded message. Removed the square message icon for unnamed timestamp labels, while preserving explicit session names.
